displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Our Taiwan Suncakes are freshly handmade with a delicate, flaky pastry and filled with smooth, lightly sweetened fillings in three delicious flavors: yam, original honey, and Musang King durian. Made with less sugar and absolutely no preservatives, each suncake offers a healthier, more natural taste while preserving the traditional charm of this beloved Taiwanese treat.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a cool and dry place. Keep away from direct sunlight.

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value: Honey, Vegetable Oil, Premium Wheat Flour, Salt, Yam Taro Filling

product.description: Lotus Biscoff is a unique cookie with a surprisingly crunchy bite and distinctive flavor. Its unique caramelized taste is loved all over the world. Enjoy the uniquely delicious. The perfect companion for your coffee! Toss them in your lunchbox for a mid-day treat, or have them as a gourmet snack at any time of day whether on your own, with family or with friends. Ideal for topping up your cookie jar and for baking. Our family packs are an excellent snack for your pantry or when entertaining a large group. These packs are also great when you need a large amount of cookies to bake your favorite recipes with, such as cheesecake or tiramisu.

metaData.Ingredients: Wheat flour, Sugar, Vegetable oils, Candy Sugar Syrup, Raising agent (Sodium hydrogen carbonate,Soya flour,Salt, Cinnamon
metaData.Key Information:
• Made with a handful of natural ingredients
• Vegan friendly, made with RSPO certified palm oil
• Contains no artificial flavors, colors, or preservatives
• Baked using a unique recipe since 1934
metaData.Preparation: Enjoy this unique taste and crunchy bite as a perfect complement to your coffee or as an on-the-go snack throughout the day.
